hero.name: Angel Francisco
hero.tagline: Computer Systems Engineering student with a technical focus on software engineering and artificial intelligence. Solid mathematical and theoretical foundations in Deep Learning, Transformers, and diffusion models.

perfil.heading: Professional Profile
perfil.subtitle: A brief look at who I am and where I am heading.
perfil.body-1: Computer Systems Engineering student with a technical focus on software engineering and artificial intelligence. Solid mathematical and theoretical foundations in Deep Learning, Transformers and diffusion models, developed in parallel with frontend development and Git version control.
perfil.body-2: I combine curiosity for generative models with a constant practice of software engineering: build, deploy, iterate. I'm especially interested in the intersection of applied AI and web products that people actually use.
